description_long: This rifle features a striking red and black camouflage pattern across its body, giving it a bold, urban tactical appearance. The stock is robust and ergonomically shaped, with a textured buttplate for stability during firing. The magazine is curved and detachable, painted with a similar red and black motif, and the grip is contoured for comfort and control. The rifle is equipped with iron sights and a standard-length barrel, with a visible muzzle device at the end. The receiver and handguard are detailed with mechanical components and rails, suggesting modularity for attachments. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer elements, designed for durability and reliability in urban environments.
description: A red and black camouflaged rifle with a detachable curved magazine, ergonomic stock, and iron sights, featuring detailed mechanical components and a standard barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the stock, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the slim profile, upper receiver, and alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, stock, and detailed receiver components.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the magazine, trigger guard, and underside of the handguard.
